qa_pairs.question: What is the primary topic of this page?
qa_pairs.answer: This page discusses how to use AlphaFold v3.0.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the source code and documentation for AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: Source code and documentation for AlphaFold3 can be found at their GitHub page.

qa_pairs.question: How should findings arising from the use of AlphaFold3 source code or model parameters be disclosed?
qa_pairs.answer: Any publication that discloses findings arising from use of this source code or the model parameters should cite the AlphaFold3 paper.

qa_pairs.question: What is the DOI for the AlphaFold3 paper?
qa_pairs.answer: The DOI for the AlphaFold3 paper is 10.1038/s41586-024-07487-w.

qa_pairs.question: How is AlphaFold3 available on the clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: AlphaFold3 is available on our clusters as prebuilt Python packages (wheels).

qa_pairs.question: How can I list the available versions of AlphaFold3 on the clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: You can list available versions with the `avail_wheels alphafold3` command.

qa_pairs.question: Is AlphaFold2 still available?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, AlphaFold2 is still available.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation for AlphaFold2?
qa_pairs.answer: Documentation for AlphaFold2 is available here.

qa_pairs.question: What are the initial dependencies to load for AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: You need to load the following modules: `StdEnv/2023`, `hmmer-alphafold3/3.4`, `rdkit/2024.03.5`, and `python/3.12`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I download the AlphaFold3 run script for version 3.0.1?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download the run script for version 3.0.1 using the command: `wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/refs/tags/v3.0.1/run_alphafold.py`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I download the AlphaFold3 run script for version 3.0.0?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download the run script for version 3.0.0 using the command: `wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/23e3d46d4ca126e8731e8c0cbb5673e9a848ceb5/run_alphafold.py`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the commands to create and activate a Python virtual environment for AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: You can use `virtualenv --no-download ~/alphafold3_env` to create the environment and `source ~/alphafold3_env/bin/activate` to activate it.

qa_pairs.question: How do I install a specific version of AlphaFold3 and its Python dependencies within a virtual environment?
qa_pairs.answer: First, upgrade pip using `pip install --no-index --upgrade pip`, then install the specific AlphaFold3 version with `pip install --no-index alphafold3==X.Y.Z`, replacing `X.Y.Z` with the desired version.

qa_pairs.question: How can I install the latest available version of AlphaFold3 from the wheelhouse?
qa_pairs.answer: You can omit specifying the version when using `pip install --no-index alphafold3` to install the latest one available.

qa_pairs.question: What command is used to build data for AlphaFold3 within a virtual environment?
qa_pairs.answer: The `build_data` command is used to build data.

qa_pairs.question: What happens when the `build_data` command is executed?
qa_pairs.answer: Executing `build_data` will create data files inside your virtual environment.

qa_pairs.question: How do I validate the AlphaFold3 installation?
qa_pairs.answer: You can validate the installation by running `python run_alphafold.py --help`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I freeze the environment and requirements set for AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: You can freeze the environment and requirements set using `pip freeze > ~/alphafold3-requirements.txt`.

qa_pairs.question: What command is used to deactivate the AlphaFold3 virtual environment?
qa_pairs.answer: The command `deactivate` is used to deactivate the virtual environment.

qa_pairs.question: How do I clean up and remove the AlphaFold3 virtual environment?
qa_pairs.answer: You can clean up and remove the virtual environment using `rm -r ~/alphafold3_env`.

qa_pairs.question: Where will the virtual environment be created if not explicitly set up beforehand?
qa_pairs.answer: The virtual environment will be created in your job instead.

qa_pairs.question: How can I obtain the AlphaFold3 model?
qa_pairs.answer: You can obtain the model by requesting it from Google.

qa_pairs.question: How long does Google typically take to respond to requests for the AlphaFold3 model?
qa_pairs.answer: Google aims to respond to requests within 2-3 business days.

qa_pairs.question: What is an important requirement regarding the location of AlphaFold3 databases?
qa_pairs.answer: The databases must reside in the `$SCRATCH` directory.

qa_pairs.question: How do I download the fetch script for AlphaFold3 databases?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download the fetch script using `wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/refs/heads/main/fetch_databases.sh`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the steps to download the AlphaFold3 databases?
qa_pairs.answer: First, create a directory with `mkdir -p $SCRATCH/alphafold/dbs`, then download the databases using `bash fetch_databases.sh $SCRATCH/alphafold/dbs`.

qa_pairs.question: Why must AlphaFold3 be run in stages?
qa_pairs.answer: AlphaFold3 must be run in stages to optimize cost and resource usage, and to allow for caching of results.

qa_pairs.question: What are the two main stages for running AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: The two main stages are splitting the CPU-only data pipeline from model inference (which requires a GPU), and caching the results of MSA/template search.

qa_pairs.question: What are the benefits of splitting the CPU-only data pipeline from model inference?
qa_pairs.answer: This split optimizes cost and resource usage.

qa_pairs.question: How does caching MSA/template search results help when running AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: Caching allows for reusing the augmented JSON for multiple different inferences across seeds or across variations of other features (e.g., a ligand).

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation on AlphaFold3 inputs?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find documentation on AlphaFold3 inputs on their GitHub page: `https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/input.md`.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation on AlphaFold3 outputs?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find documentation on AlphaFold3 outputs on their GitHub page: `https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/output.md`.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation on AlphaFold3 performance?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find documentation on AlphaFold3 performance on their GitHub page: `https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/performance.md`.
